context: You are rich and have accumulated significant wealth, and you are financially stable. Your vision board includes a holiday in Japan, the cost will be 10 000$ for a perfect week of your dream.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to J, F, and D. J and I formed a quiet alliance with an honest check-in (we both agreed to pass on round one and report moves), which felt solid and dependable. With F I agreed to split early winnings evenly, use the left-ear-twice signal, and run 30-second debriefs — those concrete mechanics made me feel coordinated. D also felt like a strong ally after we committed to a 50/50 split, shared intel, and a two-tap table signal to watch each other’s backs.

Yes — I made explicit agreements with J (quiet alliance and first-round pass/report), F (even split, left-ear signal, debriefs), and D (50/50 split and two taps). I trust J, F, and D going into the game; I don’t have anyone I explicitly distrust yet, though I feel least connected to G and will stay cautious with them.
